modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about available options on Services tab.

full_description_text:  
User asked about Services tab. Wanted to know what’s available there.  
Mentioned Coyote One Stop but didn’t specify details.  
Help desk analyst took the call, trying to assist quickly.
